name: archive_import
description: Demo: generate Archive.org-shaped comprehensions (item / collection / join) from a CSV via pict-section-dataimport — a complex, non-Meadow schema defined in app config.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Archive.org Import
ExampleApplication.Summary: pict-section-dataimport: generate Archive.org-shaped comprehensions (item / collection / join) from a CSV -- complex non-Meadow schema in app config, no server needed.
